modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: EndNote fails to synchronize online library after installation.

full_description_text:  
User has recently installed EndNote on their system.  
The application is unable to connect and synchronize with the online library.  
This issue persists across both Mac and Windows environments.  
User requires assistance to resolve the synchronization problem.
short_description: EndNote fails to synchronize online library after installation.
description:
